description: Canonical Renovate standard for rknightion + m7kni repos. Consume with { "extends": ["github>rknightion/.github:renovate-config"] } and add only genuinely repo-specific rules on top. Central policy: hash-pin every Action to an immutable SHA, treat those SHAs as immutable (never chase a re-pointed tag), 2-day supply-chain cooldown, automerge non-majors on green CI, majors get a review PR.

packageRules.description: Treat pinned Action SHAs as immutable: never chase a re-pointed tag (digest-only update). The SHA changes only when the version does, blocking silent tag-mutation / supply-chain swaps under automerge. Docker digests are unaffected.
Major bumps get a PR for manual review — never auto-merged. A repo with strong CI/test coverage can re-enable major automerge in its own config.
Never automerge release-please PRs - manual review required.
